final_prompt.prompt:
Create an e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a Japanese beauty brand.

Style/medium: needs a clean, bright, airy, feminine aesthetic with floral accents — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be hero section layout with left column (text content), center subject (model), and right column (product display + stat cards)
Subject: must include a young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
Scene/backdrop: needs a clean, airy backdrop — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs soft, bright lighting — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must include soft pink and white as primary colors, with purple flowers as accents — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include all UI text elements:
  Logo: "LUMEA BEAUTY"
  Navigation: "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ"
  CTA button: "今すぐ試す"
  Headline: "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。"
  Subheadline: "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。"
  Feature badges: "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える"
  Bullet points: "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア"
  CTA buttons: "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >"
  Trust badges: "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし"
  Stat cards: "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破"
  Benefit cards: "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must preserve all UI structure — header with 5 nav links, hero with 3-column layout, 3 feature badges (pill-shaped), 3 bullet points with checkmarks, 2 CTA buttons, trust badges, 2 product items (dropper bottle + packaging box), 3 floating stat cards (white rounded rectangles with gold accents), 3 benefit cards at bottom (horizontal white rounded rectangles with icons)
Avoid:
